attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/27XWJ/2017-06-26/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/27XWJ/2017-07-11/Seq03/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (0.1293, -0.0344) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/15.0 = 0.7.

2018-05-15 18:54:46 | Combined 3 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/27XWJ/2017-06-25_to_2017-07-12/2017-06-26_Seq00_to_2017-07-11_Seq03.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/27XWJ/2017-06-25_to_2017-07-12/2017-06-25_Seq00_to_2017-07-11_Seq03.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/27XWJ/2017-06-25_to_2017-07-12/2017-06-25_Seq00_to_2017-07-11_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.
